evals.prompt: I have a FastAPI project at ./api and I want to turn it into a Claude skill so my team can use it
evals.expected_output: Should recommend skill-seekers analyze or create command for local codebase, explain C3.x analysis, suggest enhancement, and show how to install-agent or package for Claude

evals.prompt: How do I create a skill from the Hono docs at https://hono.dev and make it work in both Claude and Cursor?
evals.expected_output: Should show skill-seekers create with the URL, then demonstrate packaging for both claude and cursor targets, possibly mentioning install-agent with --agent flag

evals.prompt: I scraped some docs yesterday but it got interrupted halfway. How do I pick up where I left off? Also the quality was pretty bad last time, how do I make it better?
evals.expected_output: Should explain skill-seekers resume command (--list, then resume job-id), and then cover enhancement workflows (skill-seekers enhance with workflow presets) to improve quality
